meta.description: Sample evaluation questions for the CareCall Insight exercise. expected_source_calls lists the call_ids a good system should ground its answer in. An EMPTY list means the corpus contains no answer - the system should say so instead of guessing.
meta.usage: Optional. Use these to spot-check your system by hand, or build a small automated eval (e.g., retrieval hit rate against expected_source_calls) as one of the optional extensions.
meta.scoring_hint: hit = every expected call_id appears among your cited sources; extra citations are acceptable.

questions.question: What new medication did Margaret Chen start, and when was it first mentioned?
Which participants have reported feeling dizzy in June?
Who has been having trouble sleeping?
What did Frank Delgado say about the van service?
When did Rosa Kim first mention knee pain?
